## Checklist

- [ ] Feature claims match code that exists.
- [ ] Env vars are documented in `.env.example` and README when changed.
- [ ] No secrets or real credentials are committed.
- [ ] Docs are updated for route, setup, deployment, or workflow changes.
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes are called out for reviewer attention.
